column7: Highest for profitability and exit because margin quality, recurring revenue and clean financials most directly affect earnings quality and valuation.
Highest for growth because strategy, validated opportunities and innovation determine future expansion capacity.
Elevated for growth because customer quality, concentration and differentiation drive sustainable expansion.
Elevated for profitability because process efficiency and technology maturity drive margin improvement.
Highest for exit because owner dependency and management depth directly determine transferability.
Highest for exit because contract transferability, disputes and legal hygiene are common due diligence friction points.
